content: Compliance Period and Penalty for Violation The MHEIs shall comply with the provisions of Section 78 of RA No. 12021 within three (3) years from the effectivity of the IRR of RA No. 12021. In no case shall MHEIs enter into an agreement with any other MHEI to comply with the requirements of the preceding sections. Failure to comply with the provision of Section 78 of RA No. 12021 within three (3) years shall result in the cancellation of the MHEI's government license or recognition. Furthermore, and subject to the provisions of Republic Act No. 6713, otherwise known as the "Code of Conduct and Ethical Standards for Public Official and Employees", no MARINA, CHED, or TESDA official or employee, or their spouse or relative up to the fourth civil degree of consanguinity or affinity shall own or have substantial interest in an MHEI or training institution.
